system.description:
This attack does [[/r 1d2]] damage + half Might. Gauntlets increase the damage die to [[/r 1d3]]. A kick does [[/r 1d3]] damage, but is -1 to hit.

If your attack takes down a pawn, and you are adjacent to another pawn, you may make another attack at -1. If that pawn is defeated, and there is another adjacent, you may make another attack at -2, and so on until you fail to defeat an adjacent pawn or there are none remaining.
